paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: BigCode Community (Hugging Face, ServiceNow Research, Northeastern University, Sea AI Lab, Carnegie Mellon University, IBM Research, Stanford University, Eleuther AI, and others)
raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoderBase introduces a large-scale, open-access Code LLM trained on 1 trillion tokens from permissively licensed GitHub data, featuring advanced capabilities like infilling and optimized inference via MQA. It serves as the foundation for further fine-tuning into specialized models like StarCoder.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 1 trillion tokens from The Stack (GitHub repositories, issues, commits, Jupyter notebooks) spanning 80+ programming languages
raw_extraction.application: Code generation, completion, infilling, debugging, and multi-language code understanding across 80+ programming languages.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, open-access, and capable Code LLMs for multi-language code generation, understanding, and manipulation.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on Python-specific code datasets (e.g., HumanEval, MBPP, DS-1000)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: 512 NVIDIA A100 80GB GPUs (distributed across 64 nodes with 3D parallelism: tensor/pipeline/data parallelism)
raw_extraction.extension: Novel combination of architectural features including 8K token context length, Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) infilling capabilities, and Multi-Query Attention (MQA) for fast large-batch inference.
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: BigCode Community (Hugging Face, ServiceNow Research, Northeastern University, Sea AI Lab, Carnegie Mellon University, IBM Research, Stanford University, Eleuther AI, and others)
raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoder builds upon StarCoderBase by fine-tuning on 35B Python tokens, achieving state-of-the-art performance on Python-focused tasks while retaining cross-language capabilities. It integrates advanced features like infilling and optimized inference for practical deployment.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 1 trillion tokens from The Stack + additional 35B Python tokens for fine-tuning
raw_extraction.application: Python code generation, completion, debugging, and infilling, alongside broader multi-language code tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Specialized yet versatile Code LLMs for Python-centric tasks while maintaining broad multi-language proficiency.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on 35B Python-specific tokens for enhanced Python code generation
raw_extraction.extension: Novel combination of architectural features including 8K token context length, Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) infilling capabilities, and Multi-Query Attention (MQA) for fast large-batch inference.
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: BigCode Consortium (including Hugging Face, Mistral AI, Salesforce, Microsoft, and others)
raw_extraction.innovation: **StarCoderPlus** builds upon StarCoder by incorporating additional proprietary datasets and further optimizing the model for improved performance across diverse programming languages and tasks, including multi-file context handling and complex logic generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack (3TB of permissively licensed source code) + additional proprietary and curated datasets
raw_extraction.application: Advanced code generation, multi-file project assistance, complex logic implementation, and specialized domain-specific coding
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhanced code generation and multi-task programming support with larger-scale and more diverse training data
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning for advanced code generation and multi-task programming support
raw_extraction.extension: Multi-file context handling and enhanced support for complex programming tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.innovation: A smaller variant of StarCoder optimized for efficiency while retaining core capabilities for code generation and technical assistance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack v2 (a curated collection of public code repositories)
raw_extraction.application: Code generation, lightweight technical assistance, educational purposes, and deployment in resource-constrained environments
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing performance and computational efficiency for code-focused language models
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
